A letter for you
For Maura Alexandrina Bellarmia
11 – 13 September 2026
Bandung  ·  Lombok

Through every laugh, every tear, every spontaneous adventure — you have been there. And now, on the biggest day of my life, I cannot imagine celebrating without you by my side.

—You were one of my first friends in this era called adulthood — being there through all the rollercoasters of both professional and personal life

—I've always loved our dinners and hangouts (especially our almost-every-Friday rituals 🫶), and how we always have each other's backs — even in the club LOL (if you're drunk, I stay sober, and vice versa 😂)

—We have so many core memories, but Bali November 2021 will always be iconic — pijet, working, and just living life together in the best way hahaha

Therefore —
I have a question for you
Always
Scroll
Dion & Oda  ·  11 – 13 September 2026

Will you be my
bridesmaid?

It would mean the absolute world to me to have you by my side as I marry the love of my life. Say you'll be there?

11 – 13 September 2026

She said yes.

Thank you! Thank you! And thank you! I am extremely happy and excited to have you by my side! Love you muchos sister!

Dion & Oda · 11 – 13 September 2026

Everything you need
to know

All the details about the celebrations, what to wear, and what comes next — just for you.

Details
01
The Celebrations
Schedule of Events
11 September 2026 · Day One

Holy Matrimony

Friday · 11.09.2026

The sacred ceremony where we exchange our vows before God and our loved ones.

Katedral Bandung
12 September 2026 · Day Two

Fly to Lombok

Saturday · 12.09.2026

We journey together to the island of Lombok for the destination celebration. Coordinate with the bride on flight details and arrangements.

Destination · Lombok
13 September 2026 · The Big Day · Sunrise

Vow Ceremony

Sunday · 13.09.2026 · 05.00 AM

As the sun rises over the Indian Ocean, we will say our vows at the breathtaking Bukit Merese hilltop. Bridesmaids to arrive early — this one is not to be missed.

Bukit Merese · Lombok
13 September 2026 · Evening

Cocktail Hour

Sunday · 13.09.2026 · 17.00

An elegant prelude to the reception — drinks, laughter, golden hour light, and the best company in the world.

Selong Selo · Lombok
13 September 2026 · Night

Wedding Reception

Sunday · 13.09.2026 · 18.00

The celebration continues into the evening. Dinner, dancing, speeches, and memories that will last a lifetime at one of Lombok's most beautiful venues.

Selong Selo · Lombok
13 September 2026 · Late Night

After Party

Sunday · 13.09.2026 · 22.00

The night is still young! Join us to keep the celebration going — dancing, laughter, and more memories to close out the most beautiful weekend of our lives.

Selong Selo · Lombok

Style Guide
Dress Code
At a glance

Two Days,
Two Looks

11 September
Modern Indonesian Kebaya with Kain Batik Kebaya & kain provided  ·  Hair & makeup done together in the morning
13 September
Bridesmaid dress — your choice of colour & design Dress provided  ·  Hair & makeup in the afternoon before cocktail hour
01
11 September 2026 · Holy Matrimony · Katedral Bandung

Modern Indonesian Kebaya

You will be wearing a Modern Indonesian Kebaya paired with Kain Batik.

Kebaya & Kain Batik will be provided
Hair & makeup will be done together in the morning
Fitting details to be shared in the group chat
02
13 September 2026 · Vow Ceremony, Cocktail Hour & Reception

Your Bridesmaid Dress

The dress will be provided — all you need to do is pick your colour and design from the options that will be shared.

Colour is entirely your choice — pick what makes you feel most beautiful.

Dress will be provided — choose your colour & design
Hair & makeup in the afternoon, before cocktail hour only
Full colour & design options shared in the group chat
A note from the bride — I want you to feel completely yourself on both days. Let me know if I can do anything to make you feel comfortable.
03
Action Items
Next Steps
01
Save All Three Dates
Block 11, 12, and 13 September 2026 in your calendar right now. The whole weekend is ours.
02
Confirm Your Attendance
Drop me a message to officially say you're in — WhatsApp or email works perfectly.
03
Join the Bridesmaids Group Chat
I'll add you to our group where all the updates, links, logistics, and my occasional panics will live.
04
Plan Your Bandung & Lombok Travel
Make sure you're available from 11–13 September. Please book your transport to Bandung for the 11th and your flight to Lombok for the 12th.
05
Dress Fitting & Details
I will provide all the details — colours, designs, and fitting schedule — separately in our group chat. Stay tuned!
Always
With Love · Lombok · 2026
Dion & Oda
Having you by my side on the most important day of my life means everything. I cannot wait for all the moments we are about to share — the stress, the laughter, the sunrise vows, the dancing. All of it. Thank you for saying yes.
Made with love ♥
